message:
fix(agents): guard _extra against overwriting known fields + add tests

The serializer merged _extra into frontmatter after setting known fields,
so _extra keys could shadow real values. Now checks against KNOWN_FIELDS
before merging. Adds tests for the collision guard and empty system_prompt
round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
